metadata.title: Product Bricks
metadata.description: Hierarchical product brick map for the audio-streaming-platform domain.

bricks.name: Listener Experience
bricks.description: Listener-facing discovery, playback, retention, and subscription capabilities.

children.name: Home Personalization & Feed
children.description: The personalized home feed that assembles recommendations, recirculation modules, and context-aware entry points.

internalModules.title: Home ranking orchestration
internalModules.description: Builds personalized modules and order for each session.

interfaces.title: Home feed UI
interfaces.description: Listener-facing home surface across app, desktop, and web.

brickDependencies.description: Uses recommendation candidates and confidence scores.
Mixes editorial programming into personalized home.

children.name: Search & Library Retrieval
children.description: Search and retrieval across tracks, artists, shows, episodes, audiobooks, playlists, and saved library items.

internalModules.title: Unified search index
internalModules.description: Indexes multi-format content and account library state.

interfaces.title: Search UI
interfaces.description: Query, autocomplete, filters, and result ranking surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on normalized metadata and entity relationships.
Uses saved-item and history state to improve retrieval.

children.name: Recommendations & Mixes
children.description: Personalized recommendations, mixes, radios, and taste-shaping suggestions across formats.

internalModules.title: Recommendation model serving
internalModules.description: Produces personalized candidates and next-best listening options.

interfaces.title: Recommendation APIs
interfaces.description: Serves recommendations to home, search, and playlist surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses experimentation and ranking intelligence.
Learns from playback and skip behavior.

children.name: Editorial & Cultural Programming
children.description: Human-curated playlists, cultural programming, launch moments, and seasonal merchandising.

internalModules.title: Editorial campaign composer
internalModules.description: Creates and schedules editorial modules and playlist placements.

interfaces.title: Editorial tooling
interfaces.description: Internal and semi-automated tools for editors and programming teams.

brickDependencies.description: Uses creator profile state and campaign context.

children.name: Playback & Queue
children.description: Streaming playback, queue management, device handoff, session continuity, and consumption telemetry.

internalModules.title: Cross-device playback engine
internalModules.description: Coordinates playback state and stream continuation across device contexts.

interfaces.title: Now playing UI
interfaces.description: Playback controls, queue, connect, and device-switching surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses authenticated identity and entitlement state.
Requires playable asset, availability, and format metadata.

children.name: Library, Likes & Collections
children.description: Saved content, playlists, follows, likes, recents, and other durable listener state.

internalModules.title: Personal library service
internalModules.description: Stores collections, likes, follows, and playlist state.

interfaces.title: Your Library UI
interfaces.description: Library browsing, playlist editing, and saved content management.

brickDependencies.description: Uses content metadata to render collections cleanly.

children.name: Sharing & Social Loops
children.description: Playlist sharing, collaborative playlists, follow loops, and socially driven recirculation.

internalModules.title: Sharing and follow graph service
internalModules.description: Handles follows, collaborative permissions, and share intent.

interfaces.title: Share and social surfaces
interfaces.description: Listener-facing sharing, collaboration, and follow prompts.

brickDependencies.description: Shares playlists and saved content state.
Connects listeners to creator follow surfaces.

children.name: Subscription & Plan Experience
children.description: Plan selection, upsell, household management, trials, entitlements, and plan lifecycle changes.

internalModules.title: Entitlements and plan orchestration
internalModules.description: Controls plan state, trials, eligibility, and upsell logic.

interfaces.title: Premium plan UI
interfaces.description: Plan comparison, purchase, and account-management experiences.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on billing, invoicing, and payment state.
Uses account and household state.

bricks.name: Creator Growth
bricks.description: Artist, podcaster, publisher, and creator tools that turn Spotify into an operating system for audience and monetization growth.

children.name: Artist Profile & Presence
children.description: Profile configuration, artist identity, merch and link surfaces, and owned creator presence on Spotify.

internalModules.title: Artist profile manager
internalModules.description: Controls profile metadata, images, links, and featured modules.

interfaces.title: Spotify for Artists profile editor
interfaces.description: Artist-facing profile management UI.

brickDependencies.description: Uses canonical artist and release metadata.

children.name: Release Operations
children.description: Release readiness, metadata checks, pitching, launch-state orchestration, and release calendars.

internalModules.title: Release readiness workflow
internalModules.description: Coordinates metadata, schedule, and eligibility checks before launch.

interfaces.title: Release planning UI
interfaces.description: Artist-facing launch and pre-release preparation tools.

brickDependencies.description: Uses rights and territory state to validate launches.
Depends on normalized catalog metadata.

children.name: Fan Activation & Campaigns
children.description: Release campaigns such as Marquee-style promotions, showcase placements, and high-intent fan activation.

internalModules.title: Campaign eligibility and targeting service
internalModules.description: Finds the right listeners for artist release campaigns.

interfaces.title: Campaign manager UI
interfaces.description: Artist and team interface for launching fan campaigns.

brickDependencies.description: Uses audience eligibility and fan propensity segments.
Uses performance insight to tune campaigns.

children.name: Audience Analytics for Music
children.description: Artist and team analytics for audience growth, release performance, geography, sources, and fan cohorts.

internalModules.title: Music insights warehouse views
internalModules.description: Aggregates audience, release, and source-of-stream metrics.

interfaces.title: Artist analytics UI
interfaces.description: Spotify for Artists reporting and insights surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses shared experimentation and analytics foundations.
Depends on reliable playback event streams.

children.name: Podcast & Video Publishing
children.description: Show, episode, and video publishing workflows with episode state, distribution, and quality controls.

internalModules.title: Creator publishing pipeline
internalModules.description: Handles ingestion, validation, scheduling, and publish state.

interfaces.title: Publishing studio UI
interfaces.description: Creator-facing publish and manage experience for audio and video episodes.

brickDependencies.description: Creates and updates canonical show and episode metadata.
Uses trust and policy screening on published content.

children.name: Audience Growth & Fan Interaction
children.description: Comments, clips, follows, prompts, and recirculation tools that help creators grow their audience inside Spotify.

internalModules.title: Creator engagement services
internalModules.description: Supports comments, clips, CTAs, and follow loops.

interfaces.title: Fan interaction UI
interfaces.description: Creator-side controls and listener-side interaction points.

brickDependencies.description: Uses shared follow and sharing state.
Uses engagement insight to tune growth actions.

children.name: Creator Monetization
children.description: Creator-side monetization across subscriptions, ad participation, Premium video revenue, and payout eligibility.

internalModules.title: Creator earnings orchestration
internalModules.description: Calculates monetization eligibility, earnings state, and payout configuration.

interfaces.title: Monetization manager UI
interfaces.description: Creator-facing monetization setup and earnings views.

brickDependencies.description: Uses financial ledger and payout workflows.
Depends on ad demand and monetizable inventory state.

children.name: Creator Audience Analytics
children.description: Audience funnel, conversion, plays, and monetization analytics for podcasters, video creators, and publishers.

internalModules.title: Creator funnel analytics service
internalModules.description: Aggregates discovery, consumption, and conversion views for creators.

interfaces.title: Creator analytics UI
interfaces.description: Dashboards for audience growth, retention, and monetization performance.

brickDependencies.description: Depends on shared event processing and experiment data.
Uses listen and watch activity streams.

bricks.name: Monetization and Foundations
bricks.description: Advertising, billing, identity, catalog, rights, trust, and experimentation foundations used across the platform.

children.name: Ad Audience Segmentation
children.description: Audience and context segmentation for advertisers and creator campaign use cases.

internalModules.title: Audience segment builder
internalModules.description: Builds listener and contextual segments from logged-in behavior and metadata.

interfaces.title: Audience planner UI
interfaces.description: Audience definition surfaces inside Ads Manager and campaign tools.

brickDependencies.description: Uses shared data products and feature stores.
Applies consent and policy controls to targeting.

children.name: Campaign Booking & Delivery
children.description: Campaign trafficking, inventory allocation, pacing, delivery, and creative serving across Spotify ad surfaces.

internalModules.title: Ad delivery engine
internalModules.description: Handles pacing, inventory decisions, and creative serving.

interfaces.title: Campaign management UI
interfaces.description: Advertiser and operator interface for campaign launch and control.

brickDependencies.description: Uses audience selection and eligibility outputs.
Uses eligible listener sessions and inventory opportunities.

children.name: Measurement & Attribution
children.description: Reach, frequency, lift, conversion, and partner measurement for advertiser outcomes.

internalModules.title: Campaign measurement pipeline
internalModules.description: Computes delivery, attention, and business outcome views.

interfaces.title: Measurement reporting UI
interfaces.description: Advertiser and agency reporting, exports, and partner connections.

brickDependencies.description: Uses delivery and impression telemetry.
Uses shared analytics infrastructure and lift methods.

children.name: Billing & Revenue Operations
children.description: Subscription billing, advertiser invoicing, creator settlements, credits, and core revenue ledger operations.

internalModules.title: Revenue ledger and settlement engine
internalModules.description: Maintains billable events, invoices, settlements, and adjustment state.

interfaces.title: Billing operations UI
interfaces.description: Internal and customer-facing billing views for subscriptions and campaigns.

brickDependencies.description: Uses account and organization ownership models.
Uses rights and royalty rules for settlements.

children.name: Identity & Accounts
children.description: Account creation, authentication, profile identity, family and team structures, and entitlement ownership.

internalModules.title: Account identity service
internalModules.description: Manages accounts, organizations, and entitlement identity.

interfaces.title: Account and access APIs
interfaces.description: Shared authentication and account-state interfaces.

children.name: Catalog & Metadata Graph
children.description: Canonical graph for tracks, artists, albums, episodes, shows, audiobooks, rights entities, and content relationships.

internalModules.title: Canonical metadata graph
internalModules.description: Stores and resolves content entities, relationships, and availability state.

interfaces.title: Catalog APIs
interfaces.description: Shared metadata and relationship APIs for product surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses territory and rights constraints.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Label and publisher feeds
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: External metadata and delivery feeds from content partners.

children.name: Rights & Licensing Operations
children.description: Rights ingestion, territory availability, royalty logic, and licensing operations across music, podcasts, and audiobooks.

internalModules.title: Rights policy engine
internalModules.description: Evaluates territory, format, and payout rules for content usage.

interfaces.title: Rights operations UI
interfaces.description: Internal operations tooling for rights and licensing state.

brickDependencies.description: Connects usage rights to settlement outcomes.

externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.name: Rights-holder systems
externalSystemsThisBrickDependsOn.description: External licensing, royalty, and availability sources.

children.name: Trust, Safety & Policy
children.description: Content policy enforcement, account safety, advertiser brand safety, and creator moderation controls.

internalModules.title: Policy and moderation controls
internalModules.description: Applies trust, abuse, privacy, and policy decisions across user and creator surfaces.

interfaces.title: Policy operations UI
interfaces.description: Internal trust, moderation, and policy-control surfaces.

brickDependencies.description: Uses account identity and abuse signals.

children.name: Platform Intelligence & Experimentation
children.description: Experimentation, event processing, feature stores, analytics products, and decision intelligence used across the platform.

internalModules.title: Experiment and insight platform
internalModules.description: Provides experiment assignment, event pipelines, and reusable metrics.

interfaces.title: Experimentation and insight tooling
interfaces.description: Internal tooling for experimentation, analytics, and model operations.
